technology_decisions.description: Local model for generating code embeddings for semantic search

options.name: all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (ONNX)
options.description: Small, fast sentence transformer running locally via ONNX Runtime
options.recommendation_reason: Best balance of size, speed, and quality for local inference

options.name: CodeBERT (ONNX)
trade_offs: Better quality but significantly larger and slower

technology_decisions.user_choice_description: Small, fast sentence transformer running locally via ONNX Runtime
technology_decisions.user_reason: Speed is critical for autocomplete — 10ms inference means we can re-embed on every keystroke

technology_decisions.description: Database for storing AST symbols, embeddings, and learning data locally

options.name: SQLite with sqlite-vss
options.description: SQLite with vector similarity search extension for unified storage
cons: Vector search not as fast as dedicated stores
options.recommendation_reason: Single-file simplicity with built-in vector search is perfect for local tool

options.name: LanceDB
options.description: Embedded vector database designed for AI applications
trade_offs: Better vector performance but adds complexity

technology_decisions.user_choice_description: SQLite with vector similarity search extension for unified storage
technology_decisions.user_reason: Keep it simple — one database for everything, zero setup for users

technology_decisions.description: Code parsing library for extracting symbols and structure across languages

options.name: tree-sitter
options.description: Incremental parsing library used by major editors for syntax analysis
trade_offs: More languages and features but heavier dependency
options.recommendation_reason: Industry standard for multi-language parsing with incremental update support

options.name: TypeScript Compiler API
options.description: TypeScript's built-in compiler API for parsing TS/JS files
pros: No extra dependency for TS projects
trade_offs: Better TS analysis but limited to one language family

technology_decisions.user_choice_description: Incremental parsing library used by major editors for syntax analysis
technology_decisions.user_reason: Need multi-language support from day one, and incremental parsing is essential for speed

summary.estimated_learning_curve: Medium - tree-sitter and sqlite-vss require some ramp-up
